notes: Runs seemingly stable as long as I don't move my mouse on a clean install. Mouse movement caused game to crash after some time. After setting cpu cycles to 20000 in "dosbox.conf" it does not crash anymore, but mouse movement still causes some minor lag. Other than that it seems playable.
title: X-COM: Apocalypse

notes: With Proton it crashes on start. Seems to work perfectly with steam-dos 0.3.2 though: https://github.com/dreamer/steam-dos
title: X-COM: Apocalypse
